Content-Type: text/css Content-Transfer-Encoding: quoted-printable Content-Location: https://uniteapi.dev/_next/static/css/5c5ef0322ccdd4f7.css @charset "utf-8"; *, ::after, ::before { box-sizing: border-box; } button, input, select, textarea { font: inherit; } button, select { text-transform: none; } body { margin: 0px; font-family: var(--mantine-font-family); font-size: var= (--mantine-font-size-md); line-height: var(--mantine-line-height); backgrou= nd-color: var(--mantine-color-body); color: var(--mantine-color-text); -web= kit-font-smoothing: var(--mantine-webkit-font-smoothing); } @media screen and (max-device-width: 31.25em) { body { text-size-adjust: 100%; } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { [data-respect-reduced-motion] [data-reduce-motion] { transition: none; an= imation: auto ease 0s 1 normal none running none; } } [data-mantine-color-scheme=3D"dark"] .mantine-dark-hidden, [data-mantine-co= lor-scheme=3D"light"] .mantine-light-hidden { display: none; } .mantine-focus-auto:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--mantine-primar= y-color-filled); outline-offset: calc(.125rem * var(--mantine-scale)); } .mantine-focus-always:focus { outline: 2px solid var(--mantine-primary-colo= r-filled); outline-offset: calc(.125rem * var(--mantine-scale)); } .mantine-focus-never:focus { outline: none; } .mantine-active:active { transform: translateY(calc(.0625rem * var(--mantin= e-scale))); } :where([dir=3D"rtl"]) .mantine-rotate-rtl { transform: rotate(180deg); } :root { color-scheme: var(--mantine-color-scheme); --mantine-z-index-app: 1= 00; --mantine-z-index-modal: 200; --mantine-z-index-popover: 300; --mantine= -z-index-overlay: 400; --mantine-z-index-max: 9999; --mantine-scale:
